units.name: Necromancer
units.description: A living necromancer who raises and commands the dead. Frail in melee — true power is the horde at your back.

units.name: Skeleton
units.description: Raised infantry bound to a spear. Brittle bones, but utterly fearless and endlessly expendable.

units.name: Female Deer
units.description: Skittish woodland prey. Bolts at the first sign of danger and kicks only when cornered.

units.name: Rat
units.description: Vermin that means nothing alone but boils out of the underbrush in packs. A bite and little else.

units.name: Zombie Rat
units.description: A reanimated rat — a tireless, expendable scrap of the swarm that never flees.

units.name: Zombie Female Deer
units.description: A shambling doe-corpse. Timid even in undeath, it lashes out with dead hooves only when pressed.

units.name: Male Deer
units.description: A wary stag. Fast and flighty, but will wheel and gore with its antlers when it cannot run.

units.name: Wolf
units.description: A pack hunter that circles, then pounces to drag down its prey. Dangerous in numbers.

units.name: Bear
units.description: A hulking bruiser. Slow to close, but its sweeping paws batter everything in front of it and it soaks punishment.

units.name: Grizzly Bear
units.description: An apex predator of the wild — vast, thickly muscled, and able to maul a whole rank with a single sweep.

units.name: Dire Wolf
units.description: A great lone wolf. Swift and savage, it pounces from range to tear into a single target.

units.name: Wolf Cub
units.description: A half-grown wolf. It still pounces and bites, but has little weight behind the attack.

units.name: Zombie Wolf
units.description: A rotting pack-beast. It keeps the wolf's pounce and hunger, and no longer knows fear.

units.name: Wolf Cub Zombie
units.description: A reanimated wolf pup — small and weak, but a fearless, tireless minion of the horde.

units.name: Zombie Male Deer
units.description: A dead stag driven on. It still gores with antlers, though it hangs back timidly until forced to fight.

units.name: Abomination
units.description: A towering stitched horror of dead flesh. Immense, resilient, and shockingly fast — it hooks its victims apart.

units.name: Light Infantry Pikeman
units.description: Living Navarrese levy behind a long pike. Its reach keeps attackers at bay in a formed line.

units.name: LightInfantryZombie1
units.description: A raised Navarre footman. The armor still hangs on it as it claws and bites for the horde.

units.name: LightInfantryZombie2
units.description: A risen light infantryman stripped of all discipline — now only teeth and nails serve the horde.

units.name: LightInfantryZombie3
units.description: A reanimated Navarre soldier, its last scraps of plate rattling as it claws at the living.

units.name: TemplarZombie1
units.description: A raised Templar, still helmed and mailed. Heavier than the common levy-dead, it rends with dead claws.

units.name: TemplarZombie2
units.description: A risen Templar in battered mail — a sturdier horde-thrall that tears with its claws.

units.name: TemplarZombie3
units.description: A reanimated Templar that both claws and bites, its helm all that remains of its holy order.

units.name: TemplarZombie4
units.description: A helmed Templar-corpse, clawing and biting tirelessly in service of the necromancer.

units.name: Light Infantry Sword & Shield
units.description: Living Navarre light infantry with blade and shield — a swift, lightly armored line trooper.

units.name: Priest
units.description: A living cleric who channels the Heavens, calling down god-rays to sear the undead. Guard him, or fall to the light.

units.name: Soldier
units.description: A disciplined Templar man-at-arms behind a tower shield — steady, armored, and hard to break in the line.

units.name: Knight
units.description: The heaviest of Navarre's living blades. Encased in plate behind a tower shield, few soldiers hit harder or hold longer.

units.name: Light Infantry Archer
units.description: A living bowman who kills at range and draws a dagger only when the enemy closes.

units.name: Skeleton Warrior
units.description: An armored skeleton with sword and shield — quicker and better protected than a common raised footman.

units.name: Elite Skeleton
units.description: A veteran skeleton hefting a battle-axe. Tougher and heavier-hitting than the rank and file.

units.name: Risen
units.description: A towering vampire-risen. Fast, powerful, and thickly warded, it flenses foes with a flurry of dead claws.

units.name: Boar
units.description: A wild boar that lowers its head and charges, trampling and goring. Stubborn and hard to put down.

units.name: Great Boar
units.description: A massive tusked boar. Its charge hits like a battering ram and its hide shrugs off blows.

units.name: Zombie Juvenile Bear
units.description: A reanimated bear. Enormous and tireless, it sweeps whole ranks aside for the horde.

units.name: Zombie Grizzly Bear
units.description: The largest of the risen beasts — a rotting grizzly that batters everything before it with sweeping claws.

units.name: Zombie Boar
units.description: A dead boar that still charges and gores. Left to wander, it roots up food to feed the horde.

units.name: Zombie Great Boar
units.description: A great tusked corpse-beast. It gores the living and forages the wilds to sustain the dead.

units.name: Wretched
units.description: The necromancer's first, feeblest shape — barely more than a robed corpse. Every evolution begins here.

units.name: Pale Acolyte
units.description: An early necromancer form hardened against harm — unnaturally tough for so slight a frame.

units.name: Wight
units.description: A martial necromancer form. Stronger and hardier than its earlier shapes, able to hold its own in the fray.

units.name: Lich
units.description: A mighty undead sorcerer-form. Deeply warded and hard to fell, commanding the deepest death magic.

units.name: Grand Necromancer
units.description: The pinnacle necromancer form — master of the death path and the horde it raises.

units.name: Necromancer (Debug)
units.description: A testing form with every school mastered and bottomless power. Not meant for normal play.

units.name: Corpse Puppet
units.description: A corpse briefly puppeted to fight with a spear — a short-lived thrall torn from a fresh body.

units.name: Peasant
units.description: An unarmed villager with only a knife and no stomach for battle. It flees, or dies, or rises again.

units.name: Huntsman
units.description: A keen-eyed woodsman with a longbow. He spots threats from afar and looses arrows before they close.

units.name: Watchdog
units.description: A chained guard dog with a sharp nose and a louder bark — it rouses the whole settlement long before it bites.

units.name: Zombie Dire Wolf
units.description: A risen dire wolf. It keeps its pounce and its speed, hunting for the horde without fear or fatigue.
